# Overleaf / custom-LaTeX Conformance Report

**Subject:** `forschungsgruppe-digital-health/thesis-latex-template` (the `wise` class)
**Date:** 2026-06-22 (re-run after the encoding fix + release tooling) ·
**Generated by:** the [`overleaf-conformance`](../.claude/skills/overleaf-conformance/) skill
**Method:** static scan (`scripts/scan.sh`), a Docker build (`texlive/texlive`, TeX Live
2026), and manual review against [the checklist](../.claude/skills/overleaf-conformance/reference/conformance-checklist.md).

> ⚠️ Builds were verified on **TeX Live 2026** (newer than overleaf.com's 2025 and the
> lagging self-hosted ZIH). A green build here is an upper bound, not proof of the older
> Overleaf baselines (see OVL-06).

> **Update (2026-06-22, later — PR #1):** since this run, several items advanced:
> **OVL-02** now satisfied for the distributed artifact (a root `template/thesis.tex` exists
> and the release ZIP is flat); **OVL-06 / DEV-01** improved — CI, release, and dev container
> are now pinned to `texlive/texlive:TL2025-historic` (still adjust to ZIH's year once O1 is
> confirmed); **PKG-02** the `.sty` helpers now carry dated `\ProvidesPackage` lines and the
> `wisetextDE`/`wisetextEN` name-mismatch warning is gone; and the **EN title-page** field
> order is fixed. Re-run the skill to regenerate the rows below.

## Verdict

**Compiles cleanly with correct German typesetting; licensing, hygiene, CI, and release
automation are in place.** The Overleaf layout blockers are **resolved for the distributed
release ZIP** (CI flattens the class beside the main `.tex` with a root main file); the
**repo working tree** still uses the `texmf/` subfolder layout + `latexmkrc` shim, pending
the planned committed `template/` starter. Remaining high-value work: pin the TeX Live
baseline to ZIH (OVL-06), commit a root-level `template/` (OVL-02 at repo level), and minor
packaging/hygiene polish.

| Severity | Pass | Warn / partial | Fail |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Blocker** | LIC-01, LIC-03, LIC-05, BUILD-01, OVL-01 (dist.) | — | — |
| **High** | **ENC-01, ENC-02, ENC-03**, ENC-05, OVL-05, OVL-07, OVL-08, LIC-02, LIC-04, REPO-01 | OVL-02 (repo-level), OVL-06 | — |
| **Medium** | OVL-03, OVL-04, ENC-04, **PKG-02**, REPO-04, **REPO-07** | PKG-03, REPO-02, DEV-01 | — |
| **Low** | PKG-01, PKG-05, PKG-07, REPO-03, REPO-05, REPO-06, **REPO-09**, DEV-02, DEV-03 | PKG-04, PKG-06, LIC-06, REPO-08 | — |

*(Bold = changed since the previous run. No FAILs remain.)*

## Encoding & fonts (ENC) — ✅ fixed this round

| id | verdict | evidence |
|----|---------|----------|
| ENC-01 | ✅ PASS | all `.tex/.cls/.sty/.bst/.bib` now valid UTF-8 (converted from latin9 with `iconv`); no BOM |
| ENC-02 | ✅ PASS | `[latin9]{inputenc}` → `[utf8]{inputenc}` in `wise.cls`/`wise_diff.cls`; no legacy inputenc remains |
| ENC-03 | ✅ PASS | `\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}` added; text extraction confirms `Abkürzungsverzeichnis`, `Übersetzung`, `Ehrenwörtliche Erklärung` etc. are correct and copy/paste/searchable |
| ENC-04 | ✅ PASS | pdfLaTeX + fontenc/NFSS; no `fontspec` |
| ENC-05 | ✅ PASS | `babel`/`ngerman` |

## Packaging (PKG)

| id | verdict | evidence / remediation |
|----|---------|------------------------|
| PKG-01 | ✅ PASS | all `.cls/.sty` open with `\NeedsTeXFormat{LaTeX2e}` |
| PKG-02 | ✅ PASS¹ | `wise.cls` now `[2026/06/22 v1.0.0 …]` (correct `YYYY/MM/DD`). ¹ the `.sty` helpers still lack a dated `\ProvidesPackage` (low) |
| PKG-03 | ⚠️ WARN (med) | `\LoadClass` (line 17) precedes `\ProcessOptions` (line 98) — deviates from the four-part order; defer to the class refactor |
| PKG-04 | ⚠️ info (low) | deps loaded without `[YYYY/MM/DD]` guards |
| PKG-05 | ✅ PASS | metadata via `\seminartitlepage{…}` |
| PKG-06 | ⚠️ WARN (low) | generic un-prefixed macros (`\introduction`, `\listofabbreviations`, `\partmark`) risk clashes |
| PKG-07 | ✅ PASS | classic `\DeclareOption…\ProcessOptions`; modernizing to `\DeclareKeys` is optional |

## Overleaf compatibility (OVL)

| id | verdict | evidence / remediation |
|----|---------|------------------------|
| OVL-01 | ✅ PASS (dist.) | **repo**: 8 custom files under `texmf/`, mitigated by the root `latexmkrc` recursive shim; **release ZIP**: CI flattens the class beside the main `.tex` (zero-config) |
| OVL-02 | ⚠️ WARN (high) | **repo** has no root main `.tex`; the **release ZIP** ships `Beispielarbeit.tex` at its root. Commit a root-level `template/thesis.tex` to satisfy this at repo level |
| OVL-03 | ✅ PASS | root file named exactly `latexmkrc` |
| OVL-04 | ✅ PASS | no relied-on magic comments |
| OVL-05 | ✅ PASS | no shell-escape/network use |
| OVL-06 | ⚠️ WARN (high) | TeX Live not pinned; built on 2026 (> overleaf.com 2025 > ZIH). Pin CI + dev container to ZIH's year (open item O1) and re-test |
| OVL-07 | ✅ PASS | `\bibliographystyle{wisenat}` + `\bibliography{…}` → latexmk auto-runs bibtex |
| OVL-08 | ✅ PASS¹ | all packages standard TeX Live; custom `.bst` committed; no fetching. ¹ re-verify on the pinned older TeX Live |
| OVL-09 | N/A | no custom fonts |

## Licensing (LIC)

| id | verdict | evidence / remediation |
|----|---------|------------------------|
| LIC-01 | ✅ PASS | `LICENSE` + `LICENSES/LPPL-1.3c.txt` (code) + `CC-BY-4.0.txt` (docs); CC not on code |
| LIC-02 | ✅ PASS¹ | `LICENSE` declares maintenance status + Current Maintainer (FGDH) + contact. ¹ also add an LPPL header block inside `wise.cls` |
| LIC-03 | ✅ PASS | bundled `.bst` headers retained verbatim |
| LIC-04 | ✅ PASS | `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md` enumerates the DIN 1505 `.bst` |
| LIC-05 | ✅ PASS | DIN 1505 styles (redistributable with notices); no publisher-restricted files |
| LIC-06 | ⚠️ WARN (low) | `.bst` renamed (`natdin`→`wisenat`); verify against upstream and update the in-file contact if modified |

## Build (BUILD)

| id | verdict | evidence |
|----|---------|----------|
| BUILD-01 | ✅ PASS | DE example compiles (≈14 pp) on TL2026; bibliography resolves; **the umlaut mojibake is gone and umlauts extract correctly** (T1 + UTF-8). Re-verify on the pinned TeX Live (OVL-06) |

## Top priorities (remaining, in order)

1. **Commit a root `template/` starter (OVL-02)** + reorganize `examples/` — the main
   repo-level Overleaf gap and the core of "improve usage/learning".
2. **Pin the TeX Live baseline (OVL-06, DEV-01)** — confirm ZIH's year (open item O1),
   pin CI + dev container, re-run the build matrix on it.
3. **Cut the legacy `wise` release** (`v1.1.0`) via release-please, then point the
   Open-in-Overleaf badge at its flattened ZIP (REPO-02).
4. **Minor polish:** EN title-page field order; dated `\ProvidesPackage` in the styles
   (PKG-02); class structure/namespacing (PKG-03/06); LPPL header in `wise.cls` (LIC-02).
5. **Later:** rename to `fgdh-thesis` (`v2.0.0`, breaking) with a `wise.cls` compat shim.

*Regenerate this report (don't hand-edit it) after changes, via the `overleaf-conformance` skill.*
